name: OSV Technical Assessment Report & Compatibility | openEuler
description: View OSV technical assessment reports for openEuler compatibility, covering COMPATIBLE tool checks, kernel KABI, ABI interface, and platform validation.

about.name: OSV Technical Assessment
about.description: Technical assessment and compatibility certification process for OSV (Operating System Vendors) based on openEuler, including COMPATIBLE tool checks, kernel KABI interface validation, user-space ABI interface checks, and platform verification.

name: OSV Technical Assessment Check Items
description: List of technical assessment check items for OSV compatibility with openEuler

item.name: Core Package Check
item.description: Core package consistency ratio between OSV and openEuler

item.name: Software Package Check
item.description: L1/L2 software package consistency ratio between OSV and openEuler

item.name: Kernel KABI Interface Check
item.description: Consistency ratio between OSV kernel KABI interface whitelist and openEuler kernel KABI interface whitelist

item.name: User-space ABI Interface Check
item.description: Consistency ratio between OSV package ABI interface and openEuler package ABI

item.name: Service Default Configuration Check
item.description: Consistency ratio between OSV package Service files and openEuler package Service files

item.name: Package Default Configuration Check
item.description: Consistency ratio between OSV package configuration files and openEuler package configuration files

item.name: Kernel Feature Configuration Check
item.description: Consistency ratio between OSV kernel configuration and openEuler kernel configuration

item.name: Repository Check
item.description: Installation success ratio of EPOL repository and software repository packages on OSV version

item.name: Basic Functionality Check
item.description: Community AT test case execution results on OSV version

item.name: Basic Performance Check
item.description: Basic performance benchmark test results on OSV version

item.name: Runtime Default Configuration Check
item.description: OSV version runtime default configuration consistency validation
